ddls:
CREATE TABLE "execution_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution step */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the execution step (e.g., Init, Read) */,
  "index_stream" TEXT /* Index stream associated with the action */,
  "new_code_row" TEXT /* New code table row affected by the action */,
  "code_stream" TEXT /* Code stream identifier */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution step (e.g., success, failed, in_progress) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the execution step in milliseconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the step */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the step was executed (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_steps_code_stream FOREIGN KEY ("code_stream") REFERENCES code_streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_steps_index_stream FOREIGN KEY ("index_stream") REFERENCES index_streams ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_steps_new_code_row FOREIGN KEY ("new_code_row") REFERENCES code_rows ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_steps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the code stream */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the code stream entails */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the code stream was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the code stream */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the code stream is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_streams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_streams" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index stream */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index stream */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., data, cache, file) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the index stream was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the index stream */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the index stream is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_streams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_rows" (
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code row */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of code represented in the row */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code functionality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the code row was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the code row */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the code row is currently active */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the code row has been logically deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_rows_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stream */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code stream being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES code_streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution step where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the error */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., info, warning, error, critical) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES execution_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code row being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the code row */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the version change */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version has been reverted */,
  "reverted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the version (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_reverted_by FOREIGN KEY ("reverted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES code_rows ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to receive the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* The notification message content */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_system" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is a system-level setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
